image.alt: Happy people showing beautiful smiles at Lakeshore Orthodontics

paragraphs.text: At Lakeshore Orthodontics, we combine advanced orthodontic treatments with a warm, family-oriented approach. Our expert team is dedicated to delivering personalized care for patients of all ages.
With easy scheduling and a comfortable, small-office atmosphere, we make your orthodontic journey hassle-free and enjoyable.

Born and raised in Windsor, Ontario, she brings fresh enthusiasm and a strong educational background to our family-oriented practice with a passion for creating confident smiles and ensuring your comfort.

testimonials.author: Elizabeth R.
testimonials.testimonial: “A large, modern, welcoming and bright space that is children and adult friendly. Staff is very polite and responsive. Dr. DeRose is very approachable, accessible and has very good interpersonal skills. Highly recommend this team for all your orthodontic needs.”

testimonials.author: Radiance Y.
testimonials.testimonial: “Going here to see Dr. DeRose for your goals will be one of the best decisions you ever make. I am so happy with my results!”

testimonials.author: Meghan L.
testimonials.testimonial: “Dr. De Rose and the staff are wonderful and so friendly! My son is very anxious and they put him at ease right away and made him feel so comfortable. They are also going above and beyond to keep their patients safe.”

testimonials.author: Steven H.
testimonials.testimonial: “I would highly recommend Lakeshore Orthodontics. It is worth the drive! We are extremely pleased with our experience. Treatment plan with easy monthly payments was ideal.”

testimonials.author: Jennifer T.
testimonials.testimonial: “We only have positive things to say over the years. When we first found out our daughter needed treatment it was daunting to us. The team made the entire process comfortable and easy to understand.”

testimonials.author: LeeAnn H.
testimonials.testimonial: “Dr. De Rose is amazing with my son. She takes the time to answer any questions or concerns he has about his treatment. Her professionalism and patience is appreciated and makes our experience very pleasant.”

Enjoying Time Together

seo.page_description: Lakeshore Orthodontics offers family-oriented orthodontic care with braces, Invisalign, retainers, and easy scheduling in Emeryville, ON.
seo.page_keywords: orthodontics, Invisalign, braces, retainers, family orthodontist, Emeryville

og_meta.title: Home - Lakeshore Orthodontics
og_meta.description: Lakeshore Orthodontics offers family-oriented orthodontic care with braces, Invisalign, retainers, and easy scheduling in Emeryville, ON.

image.alt: Team of orthodontic professionals smiling in the Lakeshore Orthodontics office lobby

paragraphs.text: Our mission at Lakeshore Orthodontics is to deliver personalized, compassionate care in a friendly, family-oriented setting where every patient feels valued and heard.

We believe that orthodontic treatment should be accessible, comfortable, and tailored to each individual's unique needs and lifestyle. Our commitment extends beyond creating beautiful smiles; we focus on building lasting relationships with our patients and their families.
We offer a variety of treatment options—including braces and Invisalign4—to create confident smiles with convenience and comfort.

Through advanced technology, gentle techniques, and flexible scheduling, we make quality orthodontic care achievable for everyone in our community, ensuring each patient leaves with not just a perfect smile, but also the confidence to share it with the world.

image.alt: Dr. Jessica De Rose smiling in her Lakeshore Orthodontics treatment room

paragraphs.text: Dr. Jessica De Rose DDS, MS, FRCD is excited to be the newest member of the Orthodontics team. Born and raised in Windsor, Ontario, she has shared a passion for dentistry and orthodontics since starting high school at Holy Names. Going through treatment herself, she naturally developed an appreciation for the field and wanted to share the experience with others by providing the utmost care for them.
With a passion for crafting beautiful smiles and a commitment to delivering exceptional patient care, Dr. De Rose brings fresh enthusiasm and a strong educational background to the practice.

image.alt: Dr. Jessica De Rose smiling in her Lakeshore Orthodontics treatment room

paragraphs.text: After graduating from the University of Windsor with a major in Biological Sciences, she pursued her lifelong dream at the University of Detroit Mercy obtaining her Doctor of Dental Surgery degree. Being both inquisitive and spirited, Dr. De Rose decided to expand her horizons by venturing to Kentucky to complete her Orthodontic speciality training at the University of Louisville, where she received both her Certificate and Master of Science Degree.

image.alt: Dr. Jessica De Rose smiling in her Lakeshore Orthodontics treatment room

paragraphs.text: In her spare time Dr. De Rose enjoys spending time with family and friends, travelling the world, and helping others achieve their health and wellness goals as a certified personal fitness trainer. Dr. De Rose looks forward to giving back to the community one smile at a time.

image.alt: Dr. Jessica De Rose smiling in her Lakeshore Orthodontics treatment room

seo.page_description: Learn about Lakeshore Orthodontics' mission to provide family-friendly orthodontic care with an experienced team and flexible scheduling.
seo.page_keywords: Orthodontics, Braces, Invisalign, Family Orthodontist, Lakeshore Orthodontics

og_meta.title: About Us | Lakeshore Orthodontics
og_meta.description: Learn about Lakeshore Orthodontics' mission to provide family-friendly orthodontic care with an experienced team and flexible scheduling.

image.alt: Smiling family welcomed at Lakeshore Orthodontics front desk

paragraphs.text: Your first appointment is where we get to know you and your goals. Expect a friendly welcome, a complete oral exam with any needed X-rays, and a clear discussion of treatment options tailored to your smile.
We’ll review your medical history, answer your questions about timing and costs, and outline insurance and payment options so you can move forward with confidence.

image.alt: Father with daughter at reception of dentist's surgery

paragraphs.text: We accept most major insurance plans and can file claims electronically to simplify your visit and reduce paperwork.
Flexible payment plans and in-house financing are available so you can choose a plan that fits your budget and timeline.
To help us provide safe, personalized care, please complete your health history before your visit when possible. This speeds check‑in and lets us focus on your exam.

image.alt: Patient filling out orthodontic health history forms online
Enjoying Time Together

seo.page_description: Learn what to expect at your first visit, find patient forms, and explore payment options. Start your orthodontic journey with a free consultation.
seo.page_keywords: orthodontics, first visit, patient forms, financing, consultation

og_meta.title: Get Started | Orthodontic Care
og_meta.description: Learn what to expect at your first visit, find patient forms, and explore payment options. Start your orthodontic journey with a free consultation.

image.alt: Orthodontic treatments overview with smiling patients in a modern clinic

paragraphs.text: Reliable and time-tested, metal braces correct a wide range of alignment issues. Modern brackets are smaller and more comfortable than ever, and our team adjusts each plan for predictable, long-term results.

image.alt: Dental checkup with braces

paragraphs.text: Damon braces use self-ligating brackets that may help teeth move more freely and can reduce the number of required adjustments. Many patients appreciate the potential for fewer visits and a comfortable, efficient treatment experience.

image.alt: Two stylish smiling teens taking a selfie

paragraphs.text: Ceramic braces blend with tooth color for a discreet appearance while delivering the control needed for precise tooth movement. They’re a strong option for patients seeking a less noticeable treatment.

image.alt: Smiling woman with clear aligner

paragraphs.text: Invisalign0AE clear aligners are custom-made, removable trays created with advanced 3D imaging to move teeth precisely. Because they’re removable, you can brush, floss, and eat normally while progressing toward a straighter smile.

image.alt: Close-up of clear aligners being placed on teeth

paragraphs.text: Lingual braces are placed behind the teeth for a fully hidden treatment option, making them attractive to adults who want discretion. They can be highly effective, though they may require an adaptation period for speech and oral hygiene.

image.alt: Adult patient receiving orthodontic treatment

paragraphs.text: For significant jaw discrepancies, orthognathic surgery combined with orthodontic care can restore function and facial balance. Our team coordinates closely with skilled surgeons to create a careful, staged plan tailored to each patient.

image.alt: Orthodontic patient receiving orthognathic surgical consultation

paragraphs.text: Retainers protect your investment and help maintain alignment long term. We provide both removable and fixed options with clear guidance so your results last.

image.alt: Young woman smiling and holding an orthodontic retainer

paragraphs.text: We evaluate children early to guide jaw growth and address developing issues before they become more complex. Early interceptive care can make later treatment simpler and more comfortable.

image.alt: Young patient receiving early orthodontic intervention
Enjoying Time Together
